svg.aria-label: High quality cover for AWS database access gateway with network load balancer and security groups
svg.title: AWS database access gateway cover with NLB and security group layered design

g.text: Preserve source IP : narrow blast radius : private data path
Pattern for secure service to database traffic
Allow only app tiers : health checks : db ports
Block wide CIDR and keep entry points explicit
RDS or Aurora in Private Subnets
Multi AZ target group : failover ready : audit friendly
Logs, routes, and IAM boundaries stay separate
